violations.description: Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. -Home canned salsa in the walk in cooler.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling areas in the kitchen in need of repair.
